subcodes.first_line: O Ḥaydar! The Wronged One hath made mention of thee from His Most Great Horizon with a remembrance wherefrom hath flowed the Kawthar of life unto all them that dwell in the realm of being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حیدر قد ذکرک المظلوم فی منظره الاکبر بذکر جری منه کوثر الحیوان لاهل الامکان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @martyrs and martyrdom, @Greatest Name
